CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Strasbourg since the age of 5, Kandil signed his first professional contract with the club on 14 May 2021. He made his professional debut with Strasbourg in a 5–1 Ligue 1 win over Saint-Étienne on 17 October 2021, coming on as a late sub in the 81st minute and assisted his side's 5th goal.On 9 August 2023, Kandil joined Ligue 2 club Annecy on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Kandil holds French and Moroccan nationalities. He was called up to the Morocco U23s in March 2023.

SUMMARY: Nordine Kandil (born 31 October 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Annecy, on loan from Strasbourg. Born in France, he represents Morocco at youth level.
